title: selaginella adunca subsp. albocincta
intro: Selaginella adunca subsp. albocincta is a type of spore-bearing vascular plant, commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its unique ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella adunca subsp. albocincta include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, which can be consumed to promote overall well-being.
